name: franks-claude-marketplace
description: Frank's personal Claude Code plugin marketplace featuring AI agent integrations and productivity tools

plugins.name: codex-exec
plugins.description: Execute OpenAI Codex CLI for AI-powered code analysis, generation, refactoring, and reviews. Enables Claude Code to delegate specialized tasks to another AI agent.

plugins.name: grok-cli
plugins.description: Drive the Grok CLI (xAI) as a headless agent from Claude Code. Delegate tasks, second opinions, diagnoses, and code changes to `grok -p`, plus image/video generation via Grok Imagine (`/imagine`, `/imagine-video`). Bundles a `grok` skill and a `grok-rescue` subagent.
